benefits.description: General health maintenance over ~9 years; no aches or pains, able to perform physically demanding work (pedicab driving)

protocol_notes: User was tested twice by Titanova in 2017 but company went out of business before follow-up testing could be completed. Intended to establish baseline and measure changes over time but was unable to continue due to lack of available telomere testing services. Dose was approximately double the currently recommended amount in original 2016 protocol.
